name: aigon
description: CLI for the Aigon Spec-Driven AI Dev Flow
author: Sen Labs (https://senlabs.ai)

scripts.test: node scripts/generate-workflow-diagrams.js --check && node tests/integration/lifecycle.test.js && node tests/integration/agent-prompt-resolver.test.js && node tests/integration/agent-log-collector.test.js && node tests/integration/landing-home-check.test.js && node tests/integration/pro-gate.test.js && node tests/integration/iterate-flag-rename.test.js && node tests/integration/feature-close-restart.test.js && node tests/integration/remote-gate-github.test.js && node tests/integration/dashboard-pr-status-endpoint.test.js && node tests/integration/stats-aggregate.test.js && node tests/integration/worktree-config-isolation.test.js && node tests/integration/feature-close-scan-target.test.js && node tests/integration/migration.test.js && node tests/integration/misc-command-wrapper.test.js && node tests/integration/auto-session-state.test.js && node tests/integration/repair-command.test.js && node tests/integration/workflow-read-model.test.js
scripts.test:all: npm test && npm run test:ui && npm run test:landing
